description:
In this video I take a look at Voxy, the LOD mod for Minecraft. I compared it briefly to Distant Horizons, went over how to get the LODs working on a server, and checked it out with a few different terrain generation mods.

Voxy mod:
https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy

Commands instructions for how to add voxy lods to your server:

New World - Name it - "VoxyLODs" - Creative + Peaceful - Seed: (server seed)
 - Create world
DISABLE VOXY
/tick freeze
/gamemode spectator
/tp @p 0.0 4096 0.0 0 90
/chunky start minecraft:overworld circle 0 0 256c 256c
Wait for however long it takes for chunky
When done, Re-enable Voxy, do /voxy import world "VoxyLODs/"
Wait for LODs to import
Leave
Join the Members server
/voxy import world "VoxyLODs/" (yes a 2nd time)

Big thanks to BBelle for editing this video!
https://www.youtube.com/@BBelle

🛠️ Download My Modpack!
Try out the same modpack I use in my videos! https://modrinth.com/modpack/sensible-modpack
